items.title: At least 27 killed in Bangkok bar fire
items.summary: Firefighters arrived at the scene in the Chatuchak district to find patrons running through blasting flames to escape.

items.title: US insists Strait of Hormuz is open as it exchanges strikes with Iran
items.summary: Iranian forces earlier said the Strait was closed and launched wide-ranging attacks at US allies and bases in the region.

items.title: US senator and close Trump ally Lindsey Graham dies after 'brief and sudden illness'
items.summary: Donald Trump pays tribute to the 71-year-old South Carolina senator, calling him a "true American patriot" who will be "greatly missed".

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 川普稱美國已「重創」伊朗

items.title: 孟加拉洪災至少50人死亡 數萬人無家可歸
items.summary: 首次上稿 07-12 23:17更新時間 07-13 06:19 孟加拉官員12日表示，過去1週季風降雨引發的洪水暴發與山崩，已至少奪走50條人命，另有數萬人被迫撤離家園。 ...…

items.title: 香港開放寵物友善餐廳引衛生論戰  連鎖餐飲安全考量首日即退出
items.summary: 香港推行允許寵物進入餐廳的新計畫後，在網路上引發關於公共衛生與寵物行為的激烈論戰。與此同時，1家連鎖餐飲分店在計畫實施僅1天後，便決定退出這項措施。  香港「南華早報」1...…
